zh.lifeSummary: 當Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien於大約1103年出生在奧地利亞特時，他的父親Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten39歲，母親Uta von Passau19歲。他於1120年與Mathilde von Sulzbach結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1173年10月6日在義大利托斯卡納享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien于大约1103年出生在奥地利亞特时，他的父亲Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten39岁，母亲Uta von Passau19岁。他于1120年与Mathilde von Sulzbach结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1173年10月6日在意大利托斯卡納享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Engelbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from engel (representing Ingal, from Ing, the name of a Germanic god), Angel ‘Angle’, or engel ‘angel’ + berht ‘bright’.

variants.name: Engelbrecht
meanings: from engel (representing Ingal, from Ing, the name of a Germanic god), Angel ‘Angle’, or engel ‘angel’ + berht ‘bright’.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien was born about 1103, in Carinthia, Austria, his father, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, was 39 and his mother, Uta von Passau, was 19. He married Mathilde von Sulzbach in 1120. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 6 October 1173, in Tuscany, Italy, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien est né environ 1103, à Kärnten, Autriche, son père, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Uta von Passau, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Sulzbach en 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1173, à Toscana, Italie, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien um 1103 in Kärnten, Österreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten 39 und seine Mutter Uta von Passau 19. Er hat 1120 Mathilde von Sulzbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1173 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Toscana, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien è nato il circa 1103 nel Carinzia, Austria, il suo padre, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Uta von Passau, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Sulzbach nel 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 ottobre 1173, nel Toscana, Italia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszienが約1103年にオーストリアクaルンテンで生まれた時，父Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärntenは39歳，母Uta von Passauは19歳であった。1120年にMathilde von Sulzbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1173年10月6日にイタリアトスカナで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien(이)가 대략 1103년 오스트리아 ka른텐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Uta von Passau(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1120년 Mathilde von Sulzbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1173년 10월 6일 이탈리아 토스캔아에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien nasceu aproximadamente 1103, em Kärnten, Áustria, seu pai, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Uta von Passau, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Sulzbach em 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1173, em Toscana, Itália, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien родился около 1103 г. в местности кaрнтен, Австрия, его отцу по имени Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Uta von Passau, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Sulzbach в 1120 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 октября 1173 г. в местности тоскана, Италия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Markgraf Engelbert III von Spanheim von Istrien von Tuszien nació aproximadamente 1103, en Kärnten, Austria, su papá, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Uta von Passau, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Sulzbach en 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1173, en Toscana, Italia, a la edad de 71 años.
